---
title: "about"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yazid-janati-414a4a1b7/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yazidjanati
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=JGor6XwAAAAJ&hl=en

---

I am a PhD candidate in statistics at Télécom SudParis - Institut Polytechnique de Paris, advised by [Sylvain Le Corff](https://sylvainlc.github.io) and [Yohan Petetin](http://www-public.imtbs-tsp.eu/~petetin/). 

I am mainly interested in Monte Carlo methods (importance sampling, sequential monte carlo) and these days i'm focusing on their synergy with variational inference and generative modeling.
